rootCause.summary: Rotated drawImageRect calls are rewritten into drawPath with an internal SkBitmapShader(kClamp), losing the original source-rect/image-bounds clipping contract before SkWebGpuDevice sees the draw.
rootCause.webgpuBehavior: Normal kClamp bitmap shader behavior extends edge texels over the full destination rect.
rootCause.skiaReferenceBehavior: The sampled footprint is clipped to the intersection between the requested source rect and the source image bounds.
rootCause.affectedRoute: SkCanvas.drawImageRect rotated path -> drawPath(SkPath.Rect(dst)) -> SkBitmapShader(kClamp) -> SkWebGpuDevice bitmap shader path

correctionDecision.reason: No safe WebGPU-only correction was identified: after SkCanvas rewrites the draw into a plain SkBitmapShader(kClamp), SkWebGpuDevice cannot reliably distinguish the internal drawImageRect case from user-authored kClamp bitmap shader fills.
unsafeLocalFixesRejected: Forcing kDecal for kClamp bitmap shader rect paths when the image footprint is smaller than the path.
Clipping WebGPU kClamp bitmap shader cover geometry to the source image footprint without drawImageRect provenance.
Changing thresholds or clearing fallbackReason while the artifact run remains below 99.95%.
correctionDecision.requiredFutureBoundary: Preserve drawImageRect provenance or carry a source-image intersection/clipped-destination contract from SkCanvas into CPU and WebGPU shader routing.

scoreImpact.reason: D52-3 is diagnostic only. WebGPU remains expected-unsupported with the stable D51/D52 fallback reason.

d52_2ValidatorCompatibility.reason: The D52-2 validator is a D52-2 scope guard and intentionally rejects the new D52-3 report, evidence JSON, and validator. D52-3 validates the checked-in D52-2 artifacts through its own root-cause validator.
